word: H5736 - עֲדַף - ʻădaph - aw-daf' - Be more

sections.paragraph:
Original: עדף

Transliteration: ‛âdaph

Phonetic: aw-daf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to remain over, be in excess
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be in excess
        1. excess (substantive)
        2. surplus (participle)
    2. (Hiphil) to have a surplus

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1569

Part(s) of speech: Verb
